title: Content Codings, Character Sets, Media Admission, and Digests · Contract Triage
summary: A preserved Go crawl trace contains one plausible scope, URL, robots, transport, body, tokenizer, goquery, frontier, goroutine, Colly callback, report, security, or shutdown defect; identify the first broken invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in representation decoding and identity ledger and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evid…
objectives: Track wire, compressed, decoded, retained, parsed, and extracted sizes and stop before resource ceilings.
Validate content-coding order and classify unsupported, corrupt, partial, over-budget, and cancellation outcomes.
Use transport media type plus conservative sniff evidence to accept HTML or XML and reject binary and ambiguous bodies.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Wire Decoded Budgets
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go team handles case 6122 during a keyboard-first accessible report review. Build deterministic Go evidence to reconcile wire and decoded budgets, coding chains, media, charsets, partial bodies, and stage digests; browser Go remains deterministic and free of native network, parser, filesystem, process, and host effects; then reorder one origin, retry, channel, context, goroutine, Colly callback, checkpoint, or shutdown event and prove ownership. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Track wire, compressed, decoded, retained, parsed, and extracted sizes and stop before resource ceilings.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Stage Digests
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-Go function headed "// Evidence: crawler-go-stage-digests-9lf9" that uses case 5417 to reconcile wire and decoded budgets, coding chains, media, charsets, partial bodies, and stage digests. Return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not open sockets, resolve DNS, import x/net/html, goquery, Colly, or robotstxt, access host files, retain credentials, launch processes or unbounded goroutines, or claim native parser, race, load, accessibility, privacy, legal, container, restore, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Go 1.26.5, x/net 0.57.0, goquery 1.12.0, Colly 2.3.0, robotstxt 1.1.2, original fixtures, custom RoundTrippers, httptest servers, controlled DNS and browser-service environments, race and fuzz runs, subprocesses, inspected binaries and containers, accessibility review, capacity, backup, restore, rollback, legal review, and release gates.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The structural check is only one gate. The following changed-case decision and explanation must also hold.

hints: For Authorized site auditing and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Stage Digests, name the owner, permission, revision, Go, seed, URL, scope, robots, response, body, tree, record, frontier, goroutine, accessibility, report, cleanup, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Stage Digests precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Authorized site auditing and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Stage Digests, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A debug Go team handles case 7932 during a mixed-origin fairness and race rehearsal. Build deterministic Go evidence to reconcile wire and decoded budgets, coding chains, media, charsets, partial bodies, and stage digests; every body, file, timer, transport, goroutine, channel, collector, and browser-service request needs one owner; then inject one session, secret, SSRF, output, path, log, privacy, or retention fault and contain every derivative. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Keep raw, decoded, tree, main-content, record, and rendered digests separate with algorithm and version.

For Authorized site auditing and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Stage Digests, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: One SHA-256 value is complete representation identity.
